name: ASRock B450M Steel Legend Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - AMD B450 Chipset - Supports DDR4-3533+(OC) - 1x PCIe 3.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 2.0 x16 - 2x M.2 Socket3 - USB 3.1 Gen2 Type-C+A - HDMI - DisplayPort - Gigabit LAN - Polychrome RGB (B450M STEEL LEGEND)
shortName: ASRock B450M Steel Legend Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - AMD
description: Micro ATX gaming motherboard with RGB lighting and dual PCIe support for AM4 platform.
